metadata.title:
BREAD AND WATER IS
THANKSGIVING FEAST


IN AND OUT Of JAIL

Free Speech Fighters Go Diet Thanksgiving Day, in


Respect to Brothers in Jail.

pages.raw_text:
Accordingly bread and water
forms the Thanksgiving fare at the
dining room of the Industrial
Workers today, while across the
street, at the Ondawa Inn, a free
dinner is being served to laboring
men who prefer full stomachs to a
fight for a principle.


A bulletin board announcing the
bread and water resolution was
posted at the Stevens street en-
trance to the l. w. w. hall this
morning. Only two meals of the
bread and water are served at that,
this regulation being in conformity
with that pursued in the city Jail.


One of the first visitors at the
Industrial headquarters this morn
ing was Attorney Bruce Rogers,
who fell in line with the order and
said the bread and water was good
enough for him. Rogers Is one of
the associate counsel for the
Workers
